---
title: "" 
image: media/foto1.png
toc: false 
about: 
  template: trestles
  image-width: 20em
  links:
    - icon: mastodon
      text: Mastodon
      href: social.tchncs.de/@thhaase
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: github.com/thhaase
    - icon: envelope
      text: E-Mail
      href: "mailto:thhaase.soz@gmail.com"
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter/ X
      href: x.com/thhaase_
    - icon: spotify
      text: Spotify
      href: https://open.spotify.com/user/kvqz88xd4goy62kojjy507veu?si=KR6CHMmaTPmgJR3d1UdKHA

---

<p class="orange-text" "h1">Thomas Haase</p>

Ich studiere aktuell BA Sozialwissenschaften an der [Justus-Liebig-Universität Gießen](https://www.uni-giessen.de/de/fbz/fb03) mit viel Leidenschaft. Neben meinem Studium lerne ich privat 

## Education

University of California, San Diego | San Diego, CA
PhD in Mathematics | Sept 2011 - June 2015

Macalester College | St. Paul MA
B.A in Economics | Sept 2007 - June 2011

## Experience

Wengo Analytics | Head Data Scientist | April 2018 - present

GeoScynce | Chief Analyst | Sept 2012 - April 2018
